summary: Iteration 20 - P0 Fixes Verification Complete. All fixes verified: 1) No lines with status 'ok' (startup cleanup working), 2) No clients with status 'pendente' (sync_clients_from_operator fixed), 3) SearchableSelect added to Linhas page with cliente filter, 4) Stats cards update correctly when filtering by client, 5) Dashboard stats API returns correct data.
passed_tests: GET /api/linhas - No lines with status 'ok' (all are 'ativo' or 'bloqueado') - PASS
GET /api/clientes - No clients with status 'pendente' (all are 'ativo', 'bloqueado', 'inativo') - PASS
GET /api/dashboard/stats - Returns correct nested structure with clientes, linhas, chips data - PASS
Linhas page loads correctly with data-testid='linhas-page' - PASS
SearchableSelect component present with data-testid='linha-cliente-filter' - PASS
SearchableSelect dropdown opens and shows 96 client options - PASS
SearchableSelect has 'Todos os clientes' option (empty value) as first option - PASS
Filtering by specific client (Maria Santos) shows only her lines (1 line) - PASS
Stats cards update when filtering: Total=1, Ativas=1, Pendentes=0, Bloqueadas=0 - PASS
Resetting filter to 'Todos os clientes' shows all 109 lines - PASS
Table shows no 'ok' status - all visible statuses are 'ativo' - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: Startup cleanup (line 3720-3723) correctly fixes legacy 'ok' status to 'ativo' on application start
sync_clients_from_operator (line 1709) correctly maps operator statuses to local statuses (ativo/bloqueado)
SearchableSelect component in Linhas.jsx correctly implements client filtering with displayLinhas computed variable
Stats cards correctly use displayLinhas for counts, updating when clienteFilter changes
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 fixes from iteration 20 verified: 1) Startup cleanup converts 'ok' status to 'ativo' for linhas, 2) sync_clients_from_operator correctly maps operator statuses (no more 'pendente'), 3) SearchableSelect added to Linhas page with full client filtering functionality. Dashboard shows 109 total lines (89 ativas, 0 pendentes, 20 bloqueadas) and 95 clients (79 ativos, 16 bloqueados).

fix_1_status_ok_cleanup.verification: GET /api/linhas returns no lines with status 'ok'

fix_3_searchable_select.verification: Component present with data-testid='linha-cliente-filter', dropdown works, filtering works

fix_4_stats_update.description: Stats cards update when filtering by client
fix_4_stats_update.verification: Stats show filtered counts when client selected
